action_set_definitions.name: search_application
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for a variance application by project name or address to retrieve its unique application_id.

query.description: The project name (e.g., 'Hudson Rise') or property address (e.g., '88 Hudson Way').

action_set_definitions.name: get_application_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full current state of a specific application, including review status, compliance checklist, and internal notes.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_development_agreements
action_set_definitions.description: Technically verifies recorded development agreements associated with the floor area transfers.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application.

action_set_definitions.name: get_environmental_record
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves internal records related to environmental impacts, specifically identifying protected sunlight-sensitive resources.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application.

example_output.mitigation_requirements: Shadow study required for winter solstice.

action_set_definitions.name: update_compliance_step
action_set_definitions.description: Updates a specific flag in the compliance checklist once a statutory prerequisite is satisfied.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application.

step_name.description: The name of the checklist item (e.g., 'public_notification', 'agreement_verification').

action_set_definitions.name: issue_board_determination
action_set_definitions.description: Records the final board decision based on SOP compliance and environmental mitigation findings.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application.

decision.description: The outcome of the Board's determination.

justification.description: Formal reasoning reflecting bulk variance SOP and sunlight mitigation.

action_set_definitions.name: close_application
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the review process and archives the application file.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application.

state_description.application_id: Unique identifier for the variance application.
state_description.property_info: Details about the physical property and its current zoning designation.
state_description.variance_request: The specific relief requested by the applicant.
state_description.review_status: Current stage in the administrative pipeline.
state_description.compliance_checklist: Boolean flags for required legal steps.
state_description.internal_notes: Chronological log of reviewer comments and internal findings.
state_description.hearing_details: Information regarding the Zoning Board of Adjustment hearing.
state_description.final_decision: The official outcome of the review.

variance_request.justification: Extreme subsurface conditions and a complex MTA easement require significant density to offset extraordinary construction costs.

internal_notes: Applicant proposes 16.0 FAR using TDR from Lot 12. Note: ZLDA (Zoning Lot Development Agreement) status is currently 'Unverified'—must be confirmed as recorded before certification.
Preliminary Shadow Study Review: Height of 345ft results in a Shadow_Sweep_Duration of 58 minutes on 'Seafarer’s Garden' during the equinox, which exceeds the 45-minute allowable threshold.
Sewer flow increment is estimated at 22,000 GPD; local main is at peak capacity.
